title: STEERING WHEEL AND STEERING COLUMN — Disassembly and Assembly (Cont'd)

figures_detected.description: Illustration showing installation of snap ring on upper shaft using a suitable tool (SST)
Illustration showing self-shear type screw location on steering lock assembly, being broken with a drill
Illustration showing installation of self-shear type screw and cutting off the screw head
Steering column assembly with dimensional measurements: 10 mm (0.4 in) and 20 mm (0.8 in). Unit: mm (in).

content_blocks.title: Snap Ring Installation on Upper Shaft

steps.text: Ensure that rounded surface of snap ring faces toward bearing when snap ring is installed.
Install snap ring on upper shaft with a suitable tool.
a. Break self-shear type screws with a drill or other appropriate tool.
b. Install self-shear type screws and then cut off self-shear type screw heads.

content_blocks.text: After installing steering column, check tilt mechanism operation (Vehicles with tilt system).
CAUTION: Do not attempt to disassemble jacket tube assembly; if defective, replace as a unit.
CAUTION: Carry out steering column assembly/disassembly in a clean dust-free environment.

tools_referenced.name: Suitable tool for snap ring installation
tools_referenced.usage: Install snap ring on upper shaft

model_notes: Tilt mechanism check applies only to vehicles equipped with tilt system.
